title: UX Researcher — AI/Agent Products
description: Relay Labs is building real-time AI voice agents for live customer interactions — think AI-powered call centers that actually sound natural. We need a UX researcher who understands how to evaluate and improve AI-driven conversations at scale.
responsibilities: Design and execute research studies for our AI voice agents — including conversation quality assessments, trust calibration studies, and task completion analysis
Develop evaluation frameworks for measuring agent performance from a user experience perspective
Conduct user interviews and moderated testing sessions to understand how people interact with autonomous voice agents
Analyze conversation logs to identify patterns in agent failures, user frustrations, and trust signals
Partner with the product team to translate research findings into specific agent behavior improvements
Build a research repository of AI conversation insights that the entire team can reference
requirements: 3+ years of UX research experience, with at least 1 year focused on AI, voice, or conversational products
Strong qualitative and quantitative research skills — you're comfortable with both interviews and conversation analytics
Experience evaluating AI systems — understanding of concepts like hallucination rates, response quality, and user trust
Excellent analytical thinking — you can synthesize patterns from large sets of conversation data
Clear, actionable communication — you translate research findings into concrete design recommendations
Familiarity with research tools (Dovetail, UserTesting, Lookback) and conversation analytics platforms
niceToHave: Background in linguistics, human-computer interaction, or cognitive science
Experience with voice UX research specifically
Familiarity with LLM evaluation methods and metrics
Publications or presentations on AI/UX research
